_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: NF1 performed significantly worse than CON on the parent-rated Vineland ABC (t(29) = 3.573, p < 0.001)
details: Successfully differentiated NF1 group from controls with significant difference (t(29) = 3.573, p < 0.001) on parent-rated Vineland ABC scores
